name: Baronies
description: A wilderness stronghold rules its countryside once cleared of monsters — move a force to each hex, the referee dicing for monsters to remove. Territory up to ten miles distant from a stronghold may be kept clear of monsters once cleared — the inhabitation of the stronghold being considered as sufficient to maintain the monster-free status (missing word restored per errata). Each territory holds 2-8 villages of 100-400 souls paying 10 GP a year each; investments (roads, canals, inns, trade, farming, fishing…) grow revenue and population at the referee's adjudication (hunting and trapping excepted).
